description: Compressor CMP-07 shows early signs of bearing wear. Find the top 5 most similar historical failure modes using vector search.
A new anomaly 'intermittent high-frequency vibration with thermal cycling' was detected. Find failure modes with similar semantic embeddings.
Refrigerant leak detected on Chiller CH-05. Retrieve similar past incidents and their resolution work orders. What was the average repair cost?
An operator described a failure as 'pump cavitation with suction line blockage'. Find semantically similar failure modes even if they use different terminology.
Anomaly ANM-312 was detected on Boiler BLR-01. Find similar anomalies across the entire fleet and rank by severity-weighted similarity.
Motor MTR-33 experienced 'stator winding insulation degradation'. Which other motors had similar failure modes, and what spare parts were used in their repairs?
